anti_claim: Batch 12 release claim-language gate validation executes copied macro lexical gate code over public-safe markdown fixtures only. It is not release approval, publication authority, semantic NLP truth, complete secret detection, portability proof, or whole-system correctness.

research_bet_contract.positive_claim: Public claim language is gated against typed evidence ceilings, boundary context, receipt body scans, and stable negative cases.
negative_floor: bare production-ready claim blocked without release authority
negative release/publication authorization disclaimers blocked as public-reader private-control-plane leaks

allowed_public_inputs: exact copied non-secret macro source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
bounded public fixture inputs and stable negative-case ids

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A copied macro body, fixture validator, or green receipt inflated into live authority, release approval, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness.
failure_modes: source module digest drifts without refreshing the exact copy and manifest
validator accepts missing or malformed required fixture inputs
public-reader copy exposes private release/publication authorization, owner, gate, or red-toggle status language as a boundary disclaimer
receipts include copied body text, private refs, provider payload bodies, credentials, or live state
capsule is treated as release, source-mutation, private-root, provider, or whole-system authority
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe exact-copy Batch-12 capsule for a bounded non-secret macro mechanism.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader rerun the copied mechanism over public fixtures while preserving strict claim ceilings.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require copied macro source modules and source_module_manifest provenance
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors
execute the public fixture exercise without invoking providers, live accounts, or source mutation
require stable negative-case ids and error codes, including public-reader private-control-plane leak cases
keep release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, source mutation, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts expose refs, hashes, counts, verdicts, and omissions but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 12 release claim-language gate instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 12 release claim-language gate without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch12_release_claim_language_gate and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch 12 release claim-language gate validation executes copied macro lexical gate code over public-safe markdown fixtures only. It is not release approval, publication authority, semantic NLP truth, complete secret detection, portability proof, or whole-system correctness.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, public_private_boundary, and anti-claim floor.
